emotional_tone: Calm, premium, trustworthy, transparent, and secure.

map_structure.search_overlay: absolute top-4 left-4 right-4 md:left-8 md:w-[400px] z-40
map_structure.panel_overlay: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 max-h-[85vh] rounded-t-3xl md:top-24 md:bottom-8 md:left-8 md:right-auto md:w-[400px] md:rounded-2xl z-40 overflow-y-auto
map_structure.fab_container: absolute bottom-6 right-6 md:bottom-8 md:right-8 z-50 flex flex-col gap-4

glassmorphism.usage: Use for the search bar, floating route cards over the map, and the bottom sheet/side panel to maintain context of the map underneath.

solid_cards.usage: Use for nested content inside the side panel (e.g., Safety Score breakdown, Safe Spot list).

buttons.primary: bg-teal-600 text-white hover:bg-teal-700 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-xl px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors duration-200
buttons.sos: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 rounded-full w-16 h-16 flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-200

components_strategy.inputs: bg-slate-50 border-transparent focus:bg-white focus:border-teal-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-teal-200 rounded-xl
components_strategy.badges: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide

shadcn_overrides.sheet: Use rounded top corners for mobile, and floating panel for desktop. Remove default Vercel-like sharp edges.
shadcn_overrides.progress: Use custom colors (Teal for progress, Slate for background).

icons.style: Use stroke-width 2, rounded edges. Size 20px (w-5 h-5) for general UI, 24px (w-6 h-6) for important actions.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG 2.1 AA. Teal-600 on white passes. Amber-600 for icons/lines.
accessibility.test_ids: Every interactive element MUST have a `data-testid` (e.g., `data-testid="search-input"`, `data-testid="sos-button"`).

map_markers.description: Use Lucide icons wrapped in HTML markers for map pins instead of generic images.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Poppins for headings and Inter for body text.
Do NOT use red for anything other than SOS and Emergency alerts. Use Teal for safe paths and Amber for caution/moderate paths. Avoid standard Google Maps blue for routes.
Implement a full-screen Leaflet map using react-leaflet. The UI should float on top of it.
Use Glassmorphism (bg-white/85 + backdrop-blur-xl) for floating panels.
Add 'Walk With Me' feature UI (share link modal) and an Emergency SOS floating button.
Include a dashboard view for aggregate stats.
